product_results.title: Nike Mens Nike Ebernon Low Basketball Shoe

summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be good quality products that are very comfortable to wear. They appreciate the nice appearance, particularly noting the shiny black finish. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the fit and durability of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Good fit
authors_reviews.text: They were for school and they are very comfy. Good quality shoe he said.
authors_reviews.author: Happy Mom

authors_reviews.title: Great purchase
authors_reviews.text: Perfect. Exactly as pictured. Very nice product, great quality. Very pleased
authors_reviews.author: Moulun

authors_reviews.title: Good shoe
authors_reviews.text: The shoes lasted long and were very good but i would say to go on a real shoe store site instead but these were great!
authors_reviews.author: royal

authors_reviews.title: Knock off Air Force
authors_reviews.text: These are a knock off Air Force brand please make sure you review product before you buy so your not disappointed when they arrive
authors_reviews.author: KH CPS

authors_reviews.title: NICE DRESS SNEAKER
authors_reviews.text: VERY COMFORTABLE.. VERY SHINY BLACK SO LOOKS GOOD FOR SOMEONE WHO WOULD LIKE A NIKE SNEAKER THAT LOOKS PROFESSIONAL. THICK SOLE.
authors_reviews.author: Doug B.
